name: browser-debug-cli
description: Local-first Playwright browser debugging and UI review tools for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run local browser observation and UI review from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Browser Debug CLI provides local-first Playwright observation, target-manifest review, deterministic findings, action plans, and a stdio MCP adapter without external upload or browser profile reuse. The packaged MCP config preserves the compatibility full profile; low-trust clients should launch browser-debug-mcp with --profile safe.
defaultPrompt: Review this local app with Browser Debug CLI.
Create a target manifest for this app.
Inspect UI findings and suggest fixes.
